testcase.name: browserSelection

error.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 143 Current browser version is 142.0.7444.176 with binary path C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe Host info: host: 'SANDHARA', ip: '192.168.43.191' Build info: version: '4.18.1', revision: 'b1d3319b48' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.9' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [], extensions: []}}]}]
